rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE HUANG ET AL VS. SANDEEP ANDRE HINGORANI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT SANDEEP HINGORANI, URSULA HINGORANI, and PIPER DAVIES's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED, in part. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to request for attorney's fees. Motion is otherwise denied.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE HUANG ET AL VS. SANDEEP ANDRE HINGORANI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT SANDEEP HINGORANI, URSULA HINGORANI, and PIPER DAVIES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part, overruled in part and moot in part. Demurrer is moot as to the cause of action for ejectment, dismissal on file. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty for Plaintiffs to allege facts giving rise to the duty. Cohen v. Kite Hill Community Assn. (1983) 142 Cal.App.3d 642. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. All other causes of action are sufficiently alleged.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CALIXTO ROBLES ET AL VS. WALTER MOREANO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT WALTER MOREANO's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint GRANTED. Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DAWSON VS. PETER ISKANDAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT PETER ISKANDAR and LEE B. DO LLC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to material facts 1, 6 and 7. Additionally moving party failed to establish that it is entitled to a judgment as a matter of law.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA S. CATRON VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Nationstar Mortgage Llc'S Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted By Plaintiff Linda S Catron, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC'S Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted By Plaintiff Linda S Catron, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Off Calendar, dismissal on file.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SONG KOCHAPHUM VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Court'S Order Sustaining Demurrer To First Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF SONG KOCHAPHUM and PHAEW BUNCHAN's Motion To Set Aside Court'S Order Sustaining Demurrer To First Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend GRANTED. Demurrer hearing is re-set for August 24, 2017. Plaintiff is ordered to file and serve opposition to demurrer no later than August 8, 2017. Plaintiff shall provide courtesy copy of the opposition, previously filed demurrer and the operative complaint no later than August 8, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. Defendant shall have until August 18, 2017 to file a reply, if any.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA DEL RAYO VASQUEZ VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 6. PLAINTIFF MARIA VASQUEZ MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Amir Massoumi To Seal Records Of Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT AMIR MASSOUMI's Motion To Seal Records Of Unlawful Detainer GRANTED as follows: The record shall be re-restricted per CCP 1161.2. No opposition filed. Defendant to prepare order.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. KEITH HENRY ARMSTRONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants To Compel Plaintiff Deposition And Production Of Written Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT KEITH ARMSTRONG and SUMMER SIMPSON's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition And Production Of Written Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff GRANTED. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for deposition on a date and time set by Defendant in accordance with Discovery Act. Plaintiff is to provide complete verified responses to Form Interrogatories without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $435.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. KAROL NAVARRETE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Defendants' Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Production Of Written Discovery And Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 7, 2017 line 9. DEFENDANT KAROL NAVARRETE and LUIS HERNANDEZ's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Production Of Written Discovery And Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff GRANTED. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for deposition on a date and time set by Defendant in accordance with Discovery Act. Plaintiff is to provide complete verified responses to Form Interrogatories without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $435.= (501/REQ)
